goal: Let split durable long-runs improve orchestration, verification, and runtime quality without needing per-task chat steering.

items.title: Add deterministic event-engine replay coverage
done_when: random event trigger/effect flow has deterministic replay coverage
engine-slice and autotest replay suites include the event-engine check
node --check and direct replay command both pass
notes: Implemented RNG injection via evaluateTrigger/checkEvents options.random.
Replay harness now covers trigger randomness, priority sorting, effect application, and territory edge cases.
Keep changes within engine/test infrastructure, not app surface.

items.title: Improve replay failure diff reporting
done_when: replay failures show which check failed and enough diff context to debug quickly
factory hook surfaces the failing replay id in its final JSON
notes: Replay suite now emits failed_check_ids, failed_checks, failure_summary, and failure_excerpt.
Factory hook now surfaces replay_failure_ids and replay_failures in both success and failure JSON.
Do not weaken failure semantics.

items.title: Add preflight signal for non-split long-run launch mistakes
done_when: operator can see from one place that split durable mode is mandatory for app-surface work
launcher output makes the active factory/game phase allocation obvious
notes: Unified launcher now emits preflight split/durable/app-surface policy details in print-only and launch modes.
Launcher validates that factory/game phase hours sum to the requested duration.
Favor launcher and docs over risky runtime surgery.

items.title: Add deterministic turn-loop replay coverage
done_when: executeTurnEvents/processPlayerChoice have deterministic smoke replay coverage on a real scenario fixture
engine-slice and autotest replay suites include the turn-loop check
node --check and direct replay command both pass
notes: Prefer bounded replay fixtures over wide simulation.
Keep app surface out of scope.
executeTurnEvents now accepts options.random passthrough so random_chance fixtures can replay deterministically.
Replay harness covers player-event selection, AI auto-choice handling, MAX_EVENTS_PER_TURN clipping, and processPlayerChoice summary output.

items.title: Materialize replay verification digest for operators
done_when: latest replay verification can be compacted into a small operator-facing digest artifact
factory hook points to the digest path in its final JSON
node --check passes for any new JS script
notes: Favor new files and concise artifacts.
Do not duplicate the full replay suite JSON.
Factory hook now writes a replay digest artifact beside the full replay suite JSON and surfaces both path and digest in final JSON.

items.title: Surface candidate next items when the factory backlog is empty
done_when: factory hook can surface conservative candidate items instead of going blank when no open items remain
candidate suggestions remain worktree-safe and bounded
notes: Do not auto-edit dirty tracked runtime files.
Heuristics should prefer docs/qa/new files first.
When no open backlog items remain, the factory hook now emits conservative candidate items with worktree safety annotations.

items.title: Materialize backlog refresh proposals when the queue is exhausted
done_when: operator can inspect a small generated proposal list when factory queue is exhausted
proposal list cites routing and handoff sources instead of freeform guesswork
artifact stays worktree-safe and generated
notes: Generated proposal artifact now lives at scripts/orchestrate/generated/factory-backlog-refresh.json.
Proposal list is filtered against current open/completed backlog ids so it stays actionable.
Do not touch public app-surface files.

items.title: Materialize a compact tie-break digest for route ties
done_when: operator can see why a top-urgency tie exists and which safe factory lane should be preferred next
tie-break summary stays compact and points back to richer routing artifacts
notes: factory_run_digest now includes route_tie_break with a preferred factory-safe lane and supporting artifact ids.
Current tie resolution prefers theme-independence over direct app-surface mutation inside the factory phase.
Do not touch public app-surface files.

items.title: Fan out diagnostic-lane backlog refresh proposals by lane
done_when: queue exhaustion under a diagnostic tie yields compact per-lane backlog refresh proposals instead of one generic diagnostic item
proposal ranking stays grounded in routing coverage, pending-agent signals, and backlog history
notes: factory-backlog-refresh now fans out map-art, qa-debt, and ux-first-frame follow-through audits when those lanes are tied.
Per-lane proposals cite coverage, pending specialists, and matching backlog history so reseeding stays operator-facing and bounded.
Do not touch public app-surface files.

items.title: Surface backlog refresh pointers in factory candidate and run digests
done_when: queue-exhausted candidate and run digests point directly to the latest factory-backlog-refresh artifact
digest summary stays compact and identifies the top reseed proposal without reopening the full JSON manually
notes: Candidate and run digests now expose factory_backlog_refresh_path and a compact factory_backlog_refresh summary when the queue is exhausted.
Lane matching in route tie review also uses bounded keyword matching so map-art support does not collide with generic artifact text.
Do not touch public app-surface files.

items.title: Promote the top backlog-refresh proposal into exhausted-state next actions
done_when: queue-exhausted candidate and run digests replace the generic next-action fallback with the top backlog-refresh proposal when one exists
summary lines stay compact and keep the canonical backlog and refresh artifact paths explicit
notes: The exhausted-state next_action now names the top reseed proposal from factory-backlog-refresh instead of only telling the operator to refresh the backlog.
Candidate artifact summary_lines also rewrite the factory next-step line so future prompts carry the concrete promotion target forward.
Do not touch public app-surface files.

items.title: Make factory-backlog-refresh the source of truth for promoted next actions
done_when: factory-backlog-refresh.json emits its own top_proposed_item and queue_next_action
candidate and run digests can inherit the promoted next step from that artifact instead of recomputing it independently
notes: The refresh artifact is now self-describing, which reduces drift between the raw proposal list and the digests that surface it.
Current pass metadata can consume top_proposed_item and queue_next_action directly from factory-backlog-refresh.json.
Do not touch public app-surface files.

items.title: Promote backlog-refresh next steps into the base factory backlog summary
done_when: buildPrompt no longer emits the stale generic factory next-step line when a backlog-refresh promotion target exists
backlogSummary.summaryLines, candidate artifacts, and run digests share the same promoted next-step wording
notes: The promoted next step now gets injected into summarizeFactoryBacklog before buildPrompt consumes summaryLines.
This keeps future factory prompts aligned with the generated backlog-refresh artifact instead of lagging a pass behind.
Do not touch public app-surface files.

items.title: Materialize a lane-specific factory follow-through audit artifact
done_when: the top backlog-refresh proposal can be materialized into a lane-specific generated audit artifact before canonical backlog promotion
per-lane refresh proposals point at that audit script instead of only pointing back to the backlog-refresh generator
notes: The audit artifact summarizes routing diagnostics, pending specialist signals, matching backlog history, and the recommended next step for one lane.
Current diagnostic tie proposals now point to materialize-factory-lane-follow-through-audit.js so the operator can inspect map-art or sibling lanes directly.
Do not touch public app-surface files.

items.title: Surface the top proposal's lane audit path in refresh and run digests
done_when: the current top backlog-refresh proposal exposes its lane-audit path when that artifact already exists
prompt summaries and run digests can point the operator directly at the lane audit without another lookup step
notes: The top-proposal summary now carries lane_audit_path, and the run digest artifacts section mirrors that path for operator navigation.
Current map-art follow-through audits can be reached directly from factory-backlog-refresh.json and the preflight run digest.
Do not touch public app-surface files.

items.title: Surface the top proposal's backlog template in refresh and run digests
done_when: the top lane audit can hand over a ready backlog item template without forcing the operator to reconstruct JSON by hand
factory-backlog-refresh.json and exhausted candidate/run digests surface that template alongside the current top proposal
notes: The lane audit now emits promote_backlog_item, and the refresh/digest summaries surface it as top_proposed_backlog_item.
Prompt-facing summary lines now tell the operator when a promotion template is already ready for the canonical backlog.
Do not touch public app-surface files.

items.title: Promote theme-independence refresh proposals when that lane leads the route
done_when: a top-urgency theme-independence route emits a factory-safe refresh proposal even when no urgency tie exists
queue-exhausted digests can stay aligned to the active theme-independence route instead of falling back to leftover diagnostic proposals
notes: theme-boundary-coverage-audit now materializes whenever theme-independence is the top urgency lane, not only during ties.
This keeps exhausted backlog refresh recommendations aligned with the active factory-safe route for theme work.
Do not touch public app-surface files.

items.title: Add a focused theme-independence replay coverage audit
done_when: operator can run a focused replay coverage audit for theme-independence instead of scanning the full axis inventory
the audit can be materialized into a generated JSON artifact for later route handoff and review
notes: Focused axis audits now surface recommended_action and operator_commands for one axis.
theme-independence can now be materialized as its own replay coverage artifact instead of only appearing inside the full inventory.
Do not touch public app-surface files.

items.title: Guard against stale backlog-refresh artifacts in current pass prompts
done_when: candidate and run digests stop promoting backlog-refresh proposal lines when the artifact was generated for a different run/pass or candidate axis
the exhausted queue points the operator at an exact rerun command for materialize-factory-backlog-refresh.js before any promotion happens
notes: The hook now carries backlog-refresh freshness_status, stale_reasons, and refresh_command in digest summaries.
When stale context is detected, factory next-step lines are rewritten to refresh the artifact instead of promoting old proposals or audit paths.
Do not touch public app-surface files.

items.title: Suppress stale lane-audit pointers inside refreshed backlog proposals
done_when: factory-backlog-refresh.json only surfaces top_proposed_lane_audit and top_proposed_backlog_item when the lane audit matches the current run/pass context
when the lane audit is stale, the refresh artifact points at the exact materialize-factory-lane-follow-through-audit.js command instead of exposing an old path/template
notes: Lane-audit freshness now checks run dir, pass index, and candidate axis before surfacing audit/template pointers.
This keeps refreshed queue artifacts from borrowing stale map-art follow-through audits across durable runs.
Do not touch public app-surface files.
